div1.entryFree: Trot, vb. to move with a high jolting pace: Ven. 277. Wiv. I, 3, 7. LLL III, 188. As III, 2, 328. As III, 2, 328 331 (the trotting pace represented, in these passages, as disagreeable to the rider). H5 III, 7, 83. H5 III, 7, 83 Tit. V, 2, 55. Lr. III, 4, 57. Lr. III, 4, 57 Peculiar passage: he --s the air, H5 III, 7, 16 (not transitively; the air being an accus. denoting the space passed over; cf. you never swum the Hellespont, Gent. I, 1, 26, and see Wing vb.)
